en: I don't care if it hurts I want to have control
I want a perfect body I want a perfect soul
I want you to notice When I'm not around
I need to do something substantial in order to get the attention of the clubs. Why?
ko: 클럽의 주목을 받으려면 뭔가 의미 있는 일을 해야 해. 왜냐고?

en: Because they're exclusive and fun, and they lead to a better life.
ko: 그들은 독점적이고 재미있으며, 더 나은 삶으로 이어지니까.
